structure_description: Categorization against a closed label set: 5 categories. Records group document titles under each category based on evidence. DOC1, DOC6, DOC7 map to '民事案由-合同，无因管理，不当得利纠纷' (construction/real estate contracts). DOC2, DOC3, DOC4 map to '危害公共安全罪' (traffic offense and endangering public safety). DOC5 maps to '劳动争议，人事争议'. DOC8, DOC9 map to '适用特殊程序案件案由' (retrial/execution objection). '用益物权纠纷' has no matches.

records.category: 民事案由-合同，无因管理，不当得利纠纷
适用特殊程序案件案由
